# Horizon Care Services

> Healthcare staffing agency supplying trained, qualified and experienced healthcare professionals to NHS trusts, nursing homes, residential care homes and supported living services across England. Company No. 14615041.

Horizon Care Services Ltd is a healthcare staffing agency. We supply registered nurses, senior healthcare assistants, healthcare assistants, and support workers to organisations that need staffing cover — including urgent, planned, and longer-term placements.

We do not market direct care packages to families or individuals through this website. Our services are aimed at organisations that need staff.

## Services

- [Healthcare Staffing](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/): Registered nurses (RGN, RMN, RNLD), senior healthcare assistants, healthcare assistants, and support workers. Available for single shifts, long-term contracts, and short-notice cover around the clock.

## About

- [About Horizon Care Services](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/about/): Our approach to staffing, compliance, and working with commissioning organisations.
- [Work For Us](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/work-for-us/): Join our register — flexible agency work for registered nurses, senior healthcare assistants, healthcare assistants, and support workers across England.

## Contact

- Phone: 020 3757 2767 (Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm)
- Email: contact@horizoncareservices.org
- Office: 475B Cheetham Hill Road, Cheetham Hill, Manchester, M8 9LR
- Service areas: Bedfordshire, Greater Manchester, Merseyside, Lancashire (including Blackpool and Rossendale), Yorkshire — and broader England on request
